subcodes.first_line: This is a leaf stirred by the breezes of the Will of the All-Merciful, that it might draw nigh unto them who have believed in God, the Most High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه ورقه حرکتها اریاح مشیه الرحمن لیقربها الی الذین هم آمنوا بالله العلی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
